build.buildCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && npm install -g @babel/core @babel/cli @babel/preset-react && babel static/js/eu-components.jsx -o static/js/eu-components.js --presets @babel/preset-react && babel static/js/eu-screens.jsx -o static/js/eu-screens.js --presets @babel/preset-react && babel static/js/cmdk.jsx -o static/js/cmdk.js --presets @babel/preset-react && babel static/js/eu-app.jsx -o static/js/eu-app.js --presets @babel/preset-react
